narrative:
Wayne Township C (precinct in Clermont County) has 1,169 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.4 percentage points.
